name: Seated Twist on Stability Ball
shortDescription: A rotational core exercise performed while seated on a stability ball to target the obliques.
instructions: Sit upright on a stability ball, feet flat and hip-width apart. Twist your torso to one side while keeping hips steady, then return to center and repeat on the other side.
steps: Sit on a stability ball with feet flat, core engaged.
Hold arms in front or across chest.
Rotate your torso to the right, keeping hips stationary.
Pause, then twist to the left.
breathing: Exhale during the twist, inhale as you return to center.
